intro.p1: Before continue you need to connect HVAC to your current WiFi network.
intro.p2: It can be done using regular manufacturer application like EWPE Smart or using CLI instruction from app README (advanced users)
intro.static_ip_link: My device has a static IP address →

static_ip.description: Enter the static IP address of your HVAC device. The device must be reachable on your network.
static_ip.label: IP Address
static_ip.skip_scan: Skip UDP scan (use when UDP is blocked)
static_ip.error_no_response: No response from device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is reachable.

error.offline: Your HVAC went offline. Trying to reconnect...
